steps.title: Simplify the second equation
steps.content:
The second equation is written as $x + y + y = 115$. This can be rewritten more clearly as:
$$x + 2y = 115$$
Now we have two equations in standard form.

steps.title: Eliminate x by subtracting the equations
steps.content:
We have:
$$x + y = 105$$
$$x + 2y = 115$$
Subtracting the first equation from the second eliminates $x$:
$$(x + 2y) - (x + y) = 115 - 105$$
$$y = 10$$
